_comment: Session cluster centroids. One doc per HDBSCAN cluster per run plus one run_summary per run. Parallel to es-mappings/cowrie/command_clusters.json but keyed to session-level clustering. `playbook_id` (format: `sescl-<run_id>-pg<N>`) is the canonical playbook primary key — multiple cluster docs in the same run may share one `playbook_id` if their centroids were merged at `session.playbook_merge_threshold`. `playbook_name` is a human-readable LLM-generated display label and may duplicate across playbooks. A 'playbook' is the LLM-named group of one or more session clusters — distinct from a 'campaign', which is a multi-session pattern mined into a separate index (see es-mappings/cowrie/campaigns.json).
